allow: Bash(claude mcp add filesystem --scope project -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem "D:\\Project\\ScheduleBox")
Bash(claude mcp add memory --scope project -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@schedulebox.cz","password":"password123"}' 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@schedulebox.cz","password":"password123"}' 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Project/ScheduleBox && psql postgresql://schedulebox:schedulebox@localhost:5432/schedulebox -c "SELECT id, name FROM companies ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Project/ScheduleBox && pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; rm -rf apps/web/.next && pnpm dev)
Bash(cd D:/Project/ScheduleBox && rm -rf apps/web/.next && pnpm dev)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\\\Program Files' -Filter 'PostgreSQL*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\\\Program Files' -Filter 'psql*' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName")
